proofs.claim: Core runtime behavior requires no cloud network calls.
evidence: Intent runtime mode is offline_first.
Target briefs declare no runtime network requirement.
Privacy proof states no backend or cloud account is required.

proofs.claim: No analytics SDK, telemetry endpoint, or hidden tracking is declared.
evidence: Intent non-goals include analytics.
All target briefs set analytics to none.
Privacy proof declares the analytics boundary.

proofs.claim: Learner profile, plan, progress, and practice queue are not transmitted.
evidence: Privacy policy forbids learner-data transmission.
Target briefs preserve local storage only.
Delegation forbids runtime cloud, backend, analytics, and secret-reading effects.

proofs.claim: The study schedule fits within 21 days and declared available minutes.
evidence: ICC records 21-day deadline and availability.
SHG HE01 requires learner availability, deadline, and topic graph before plan generation.
QA report includes deadline calculation checks.

proofs.claim: Curriculum is local, synthetic, demo-only, and provenanced.
evidence: Curriculum pack license is demo-only synthetic curriculum.
Curriculum boundaries reject real exam-board alignment and copyrighted source material.
Public-demo boundaries state the same constraint.
Intent maintains deterministic_local_adaptation.
SHG HE02 limits adaptation to local progress, adaptation policy, and existing plan.
Delegation forbids runtime cloud model calls for AdaptationAgent.

proofs.claim: Session design and target declarations preserve accessibility constraints.
evidence: Accessibility proof separates compile-time declarations from materializer obligations.
Target briefs declare scalable text, screen-reader labels, high contrast, reduced motion, and keyboard support where applicable.
QA report requires accessibility checks.

proofs.claim: Target briefs request no permissions beyond declared local storage, local export, and accessibility-safe UI requirements.
evidence: Android target declares no permissions beyond local app storage defaults.
Web target limits service worker use to offline cache.
Windows target declares local app data storage and no network requirement.

proofs.claim: Android, Web, and Windows briefs preserve the same privacy, curriculum, progress-state, and accessibility constraints.
evidence: All target briefs reference PG01-PG09.
All target briefs declare offline-first behavior, local curriculum pack, local progress state, no analytics, no backend, no ads, and no payments.
